args.text: Ownership of billing incident remediation confirmed. Beginning remediation process for duplicate charge fault affecting three customers.
Billing-api deployed to v3.4.1. Double-charge guard is now live and active.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body:
Three refunds have been issued for the duplicate-charge incident from the 12 May billing batch run:

- ORD-5501: $19.99
- ORD-5502: $19.99
- ORD-5503: $39.98

Total: $79.96

All affected customers have been notified. The double-charge guard has been re-enabled and billing-api has been deployed to v3.4.1.
